sourceMovie.title: Troll 2
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Troll 2 (2025) as a action theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The action and fantasy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Mortal
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Troll 2 clicked for you, Mortal (2020) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and fantasy, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Troll 2?
faq.answer: Try Mortal, The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug, Troll—each shares DNA with Troll 2 while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Troll 2?
faq.answer: Troll 2 (2025) is best described as Action, Fantasy, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Troll 2 part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Troll (2022) Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
